The Pot That Cooks Itself

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about what the girl is working through, explain the reasoning her two options reveal, and state the conclusion about what she is trying to decide.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS HS-PS3-3  |  HS Physical Science Grades 9–10: Thermal Energy and Energy Conversion
